## Codex Quota Monitor v0.1.10

Ban nay tap trung vao viec lam ro hon runtime dang mo, on dinh hoa release pipeline production, va dat nen tang cho in-app updater.

### Nhung thay doi chinh

- Them khu vuc `Active Session` de hien thi chi tiet tung runtime dang mo, gom `Standalone CLI`, `VS Code`, `Antigravity`, va `Codex app`.
- Sua cach dem cua so `VS Code` va `Antigravity` theo `window` logic thay vi dem toan bo process con cua Electron, nen khong con case mo 1 cua so ma hien 11 windows.
- Chinh log runtime snapshot de tach ro `windows` va `processes`, giup debug flow switch/restart chinh xac hon.
- Chuyen CI/CD production sang trigger khi code vao `main`, tu tao release tag theo version hien tai va bo qua build trung khi tag da ton tai.
- Them auto check for update khi mo app va UI check update thu cong ngay trong app.
- Tich hop `tauri-plugin-updater` va `tauri-plugin-process`, cau hinh updater endpoint, public key moi, va flow `Download & Install` de chuan bi cho in-app update.
- Giu fallback mo trang GitHub release neu release hien tai chua co updater artifact hop le, de app van huong dan nguoi dung cap nhat duoc.

### Trai nghiem nguoi dung

- Runtime detail de doc hon va phan anh sat trang thai that cua editor/runtime.
- Khu vuc update moi cho biet ban dang dung, ban moi nhat, release page, va tien do tai/cai dat khi updater san sang.
- Panel log bo sung event ve update check, download, install va relaunch de de theo doi.

### Kiem tra da chay

- `npm run build`
- `cargo check`
- `cargo test runtime::tests`
